login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue learning.
login.missingFields: Please enter your email and password.
login.unableToSignIn: Unable to sign in. Check your credentials and try again.
login.genericError: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join AcademiX as a student or teacher
register.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters long
register.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields
register.failureFallback: Couldn’t create your account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successToastDescription: If an account exists, you will receive a password reset link.
forgotPassword.emailSentDetails: If an account exists for <1>{{email}}</1>, you will receive an email with a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below. This link expires in 1 hour.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid reset link. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.linkExpiredDescription: Link may be expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.invalidLinkBody: This reset link is invalid or missing. Please use the link from your email or request a new one.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.successCardBody: Your email has been verified. You can use your account fully now.
verifyEmail.failureFallback: Verification failed. Link may be expired.
verifyEmail.fallbackSubtitle: Use the link from your verification email.
verifyEmail.expiredHint: Link expired or invalid? Enter your email to receive a new verification link.
verifyEmail.resendSuccessDescription: If your email is not yet verified, you will receive a new verification link.
verifyEmail.checkInboxNote: Check your inbox for the verification link we sent when you signed up.
